assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity returns 401 when no Authorization header is provided
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when no Authorization header is provided

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity returns 403 when the caller is not a member of the board
assertionResults.title: returns 403 when the caller is not a member of the board

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity returns 200 with events when authenticated member
assertionResults.title: returns 200 with events when authenticated member

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move creates an ActivityEvent atomically with the card update
assertionResults.title: creates an ActivityEvent atomically with the card update

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move returns 404 and never calls move when the card does not exist
assertionResults.title: returns 404 and never calls move when the card does not exist

assertionResults.fullName: PATCH /cards/:id/move returns 500 and rolls back cleanly when the transaction fails (e.g. non-existent target list)
assertionResults.title: returns 500 and rolls back cleanly when the transaction fails (e.g. non-existent target list)

assertionResults.fullName: GET /boards/:id/activity/preview returns events in reverse chronological order without requiring authentication
assertionResults.title: returns events in reverse chronological order without requiring authentication
